untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'time window expiration logic' (exit after 75% of setup window elapsed without confirmation) which cannot be expressed as a simple 3-field condition. This requires temporal state tracking beyond allowed operators. Volatility breakout approximated using Bollinger Bands crossover, but the time-based exit condition is not translatable to the rule engine schema.
translation_notes: Volatility breakout interpreted as price crossing Bollinger Bands (bb_upper/bb_lower). Price confirmation modeled as crossover event. Stop loss set to 2.0% based on signal parameters. Time window exit (75% elapsed) requires state machine logic not available in condition-based engine.
